meta.author: solution-architect
meta.capacity_estimation: N/A - single-developer local dev tool, no load/throughput dimension

FR-1.claim: SkillManager + ImportManager fetch via GitHub HTTP, never check local sibling
FR-1.evidence: SkillManager._download_with_retry uses urllib->raw.githubusercontent.com; disk cache is ~/.claude/skills not ../claude-global-library. ImportManager.get_skill/get_agent are pure GitHub HTTP.

FR-2.claim: hook-downloader.py referenced in 3 places but does not exist -> sync 100% broken
FR-2.evidence: scripts/tools/sync-library.py subprocesses a non-existent hook-downloader.py; referenced by sync-library.bat, sync-workflow-engine.bat, update-status.bat, README, 2 docs.

FR-3.claim: Step-0 routing is raw LLM guess; never consults decision tree/Master KG/agent catalog; Steps 5/6 deleted
FR-3.evidence: grep 'knowledge-graph|decision_nodes|patterns.json|Master KG' across entire langgraph_engine = 0 files. prompt_generator=LLM task_type/complexity only. todo_decomposer=claude CLI guesses agents. decision_explainer.py still documents 'Skill Selection Decision (Step 5)'.

FR-4.claim: standards/selector.py hand-writes Flask/Django/Spring only; FastAPI/React/Angular/Vue/Express empty
FR-4.evidence: Selector hand-writes nothing; reads docs/*.md. load_framework_standards returns empty for EVERY framework (no framework docs bundled for anyone). All frameworks fall back to language-level docs. Underlying gap (no framework depth) is real; premise is not.

FR-5.evidence: Each emits a structured commented test skeleton ending in 'pass # TODO: configure <fw> test client and route' - deliberate stubs, not unimplemented. Path-based generation fully implemented. Enhancement valid but lower urgency.

FR-6.claim: scripts/pre_tool_enforcer/ and hooks/pre_tool_enforcer/ both exist; one dead
FR-6.evidence: Both exist. hooks/pre-tool-enforcer.py is a shim loading hooks/pre_tool_enforcer/ (LIVE). scripts/pre_tool_enforcer/ referenced only by 2 docs (zero live code), lacks newest policy agent_persona.py -> dead.

FR-7.claim: SRS version stuck at 1.15.1 vs shipped 1.20.0
FR-7.evidence: SRS.md header Version: 1.15.1 (2026-03-21); VERSION file 1.20.0. Second SRS also exists at docs/SYSTEM_REQUIREMENTS_SPECIFICATION.md.

FR-8.claim: CLAUDE.md/SRS describe policies/ tree that doesn't exist; content in docs/
FR-8.evidence: CLAUDE.md documents policies/{00-auto-fix,01-sync,02-standards,03-execution,testing}. On disk policies/ has exactly one file (03-execution-system/failure-prevention/failure-kb.json). ~60 *-policy.md live in docs/. Standards loader reads team policies from ~/.claude/policies (home), not repo.

FR-9.claim: cli.py and decision_explainer.py reference deleted Step 1/5 numbering
FR-9.evidence: decision_explainer.py CONFIRMED (Step 1/5/10). scripts/cli.py has NO Step references. Only decision_explainer.py carries stale numbering.

KEEP.reason: Live enforcement package (loaded by hooks/pre-tool-enforcer.py shim).
No stale Step references found; recon wrong; no change.

KEEP.component: backward-compat shims (skills/manager callers, integration_test_generator.py root shim)

CHANGE.reason: Insert local-sibling tier ahead of GitHub; delegate to ResourceResolver.
Add local-sibling tier; fix skill.md->SKILL.md casing bug.
Replace dead hook-downloader subprocess with verify-sibling + optional git pull wrapper.
Consume FlowState.routing grounding; stop guessing agents.
Inject resolved real agent roster + skills into orchestration prompt.
Enrich framework stubs from library quality-testing/backend skills; keep no-LLM template approach. P2/low.
Correct policies/ tree description to match disk (content in docs/); add new routing/ + library/ packages.
Update stale Step 1/5/10 numbering to current node names.

NEW.reason: Single Strategy/Chain-of-Responsibility resolver both loaders delegate to (DRY).
Verify sibling + optional git pull; NOT a full downloader.
Deterministic pre-LLM node: decision-tree traversal -> domain -> agent -> persona/skill grounding.
Pure-Python KG reader ports behind KGRouter.
Adapter: framework -> library skill -> extracted standards section.

DEPRECATE.component: hook-downloader.py references in sync-library.bat / sync-workflow-engine.bat / update-status.bat

DEPRECATE.reason: Dead duplicate; zero live references; delete.

adrs.title: Local-path bridge: resolution order, versioning, fallback
adrs.decision: Chain: local sibling (default, rolling disk state) -> GitHub HTTP (opt-in via CLAUDE_ALLOW_GITHUB_FALLBACK) -> hard-fail with typed LibrarySetupError. Local=rolling, remote fallback=pinnable.

adrs.title: Sync mechanism: eliminate hook-downloader.py, thin verify+pull wrapper
adrs.decision: Delete references; replace sync-library.py with verify-sibling + optional git pull --ff-only. No new downloader.

adrs.title: KG routing integration: new deterministic node vs rewrite step
adrs.decision: Option A: NEW deterministic KGRouter node before prompt_generator; existing LLM steps consume routing grounding. Chosen for SRP, offline testability, OCP, backward-compat, explainability. On unresolved domain -> status=unresolved + legacy path (never forces wrong agent).
adrs.alternatives: Option B (rewrite prompt_generator/todo_decomposer inline) rejected: mixes deterministic+LLM, higher regression risk, harder to test.
adrs.supersedes: undocumented 'LLM guesses the agent / former Step 5-6 selection'

adrs.title: Standards content sourced from library skills
adrs.decision: LibrarySkillStandardsAdapter tier (priority 1.5) maps framework->library skill->standards section, read via ADR-1 resolver. Bundled docs/{fw}-standards.md still overrides.

tech_debt_found: import_manager.get_skill fetches lowercase skill.md but library ships SKILL.md -> latently broken against real library (fixed by C2).
Two overlapping resource loaders (SkillManager, ImportManager) with duplicated GitHub-fetch logic -> consolidate behind ResourceResolver (C3).
Repo policies/ directory vestigial (1 file); CLAUDE.md over-describes it.
Dead code duplicate scripts/pre_tool_enforcer/ shadows live hooks/pre_tool_enforcer/.
decision_explainer.py documents removed Step 5/6 selection numbering -> corroborates FR-3 that KG selection was deleted.

real_nfrs: backward compatibility of hook + FlowState contracts

security_threats.threat: supply-chain via opt-in GitHub HTTP fallback
security_threats.mitigation: off by default; pin ref via CLAUDE_SKILL_REPO_URL; content never exec'd; https only
defensive parse -> status=unresolved, not pipeline abort

open_questions: ADR-3 Option A confirmation (recommendation firm; core routing seam).
Domain-signal derivation: lexical-only vs optional single-shot LLM classifier fallback.
policies/ dir fate: correct docs to match disk vs relocate failure-kb.json (verify failure_kb.py load path first).

implementation_order.endorsement: Recon's 1->2->3->4 then 5/6 parallel then 7-9 endorsed; single adjustment: FR-7/8/9 docs updates follow FR-1..4 so they document final structure.
implementation_order.dependency_notes: FR-2/FR-3/FR-4 all depend on FR-1 ResourceResolver + locate_library_root(). FR-3 is the main value-add. FR-5/FR-6 independent. FR-7/8/9 zero code risk.
